case_title: JACQUELINE SILVA VS. DEYSI GAEN ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE SILVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEYSI GAEN IS NOT PRESENT. ORDER RE: OEX OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE SILVA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER PIEDAD BLANCO-KRETCHMER. DEFENDANT DEYSI GAEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRANSPORTES PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL, LLC. REPRESENTED BY JOSE ZALDANA (MANAGER), ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER PIEDAD BLANCO-KRETCHMER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $400.00 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK BY DEC-20-2021 AND MAILED OUT. ALSO, THE BOX IS TO BE DELIVERED BY FEB-20-2022 TO THE SET LOCATION. FAILURE TO DO SO BEFORE THE COURT DATE AN ADDITIONAL $350.00 WILL BE ADDED FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-28-2022 HEARING BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANSPORTES PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL, LLC $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, JUDGMENT IS AGAINST TRANSPORTES PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION [THIRD PERSON] (REQUEST FORWARDED FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA, JACQUELINE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA, JACQUELINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY SILVA, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT GAEN, DEYSI TRANSPORTES PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ZALDANA, JOSE MANAGER, TRANSPORTES PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL, LLC HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
